Title: Dal Bhat
Description: The heart of Nepali cuisine — lentil soup served with steamed rice, seasonal vegetables, and achaar.

Title: Momo
Description: Steamed or fried dumplings stuffed with spiced minced meat or vegetables, served with tomato chutney.

Title: Thukpa
Description: Hearty Tibetan-Nepali noodle soup loaded with vegetables or meat in a rich, spiced broth.

Title: Sel Roti
Description: Traditional Nepali rice-flour donut, crispy outside and soft inside, a festival favourite.

Title: Gundruk Ko Achar
Description: Fermented leafy greens tossed with mustard oil, chillies, and spices — a Nepali staple side dish.

Title: Dhido
Description: Traditional buckwheat or millet porridge, a rustic Nepali staple often served with gundruk soup.

Title: Choila
Description: Spicy grilled buffalo meat marinated with mustard oil, garlic, ginger, and Newari spices.

Title: Wo (Bara)
Description: Newari lentil pancake, crispy and savoury, often topped with egg or minced meat.

Title: Yomari
Description: Sweet steamed rice-flour dumpling filled with chaku (molasses and sesame), a Newar delicacy.

Title: Kwati
Description: A wholesome nine-bean soup slow-cooked with spices, traditionally eaten during Janai Purnima.

Title: Aloo Tama
Description: Tangy bamboo shoot and potato curry cooked with black-eyed beans — a classic Newar comfort dish.

Title: Sukuti Sadeko
Description: Dried and spiced smoked meat salad tossed with sesame, chillies, and mustard oil.

Title: Samay Baji
Description: Traditional Newari platter — beaten rice, bara, choila, eggs, pickles and more.

Title: Tarkari Bhaat
Description: Mixed vegetable curry served over fluffy steamed basmati rice with homemade pickle.

Title: Fried Momo
Description: Golden crispy fried dumplings stuffed with spiced chicken, served with signature dipping sauce.

Title: Chatamari
Description: The Nepali pizza — thin rice-flour crepe topped with minced meat, egg, and spices.

Title: Masala Chicken
Description: Tender chicken slow-cooked in aromatic Nepali spices and tomato-onion gravy.

Title: Vegetable Pulao
Description: Fragrant saffron and whole-spice rice cooked with seasonal vegetables and ghee.

Title: Naan with Dal Makhani
Description: Soft tandoor-baked naan bread paired with rich creamy dal makhani curry.

Title: Kheer
Description: Creamy rice pudding simmered in full-fat milk with cardamom, saffron, and pistachios.

Title: Masala Cold Soda
Description: Chilled sparkling soda infused with homemade masala syrup, black salt, and mint.

Title: Rose Sharbat
Description: Chilled rose-water syrup with basil seeds and ice — a cooling floral refresher.

Title: Aam Panna
Description: Tangy raw mango cooler with cumin, black salt, and mint — a summer essential.

Title: Cold Brew Coffee
Description: Smooth 12-hour cold-brewed coffee served over ice with a hint of cardamom.

Title: Masala Chiya
Description: Traditional Nepali spiced milk tea brewed with ginger, cardamom, cinnamon, and cloves.

Title: Butter Tea (Suja)
Description: Himalayan yak butter tea — rich, salty, and warming, a staple of mountain communities.

Title: Tongba
Description: Fermented millet beer from eastern Nepal, served warm in a wooden vessel with bamboo straw.

Title: Lassi
Description: Thick blended yoghurt drink available plain, sweet, salted, or mango flavoured.

Title: Watermelon Juice
Description: Freshly pressed watermelon blended with a squeeze of lime and a pinch of black salt.

Title: Sugarcane Juice
Description: Freshly extracted sugarcane juice with ginger and lemon — cold-pressed and served chilled.

Title: Mango Smoothie
Description: Thick Alphonso mango blended with chilled yoghurt and honey — a tropical classic.

Title: Beetroot Carrot Juice
Description: Earthy beetroot and carrot blended with apple and a sliver of ginger.

Title: Dal Bhat Combo
Description: Full Dal Bhat thali + 2 Momo + 1 glass Masala Chiya. The ultimate Nepali meal deal.

Title: Momo Party Set
Description: 20 pcs mixed Momo (steam + fry) with 2 dipping sauces and 2 cold drinks. Serves 2.

Title: Newari Feast
Description: Choila, Bara, Chatamari, Aloo Tama, and Tongba — the full Newar cultural platter.

Title: Refreshment Bundle
Description: Choice of any juice + 1 snack (Sel Roti or Samay Baji) — perfect afternoon pick-me-up.
